jsonLd.title: Principal Instructional Designer at Gradeup
jsonLd.description:
Gradeup invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Instructional Designer at our Thane location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Gradeup:
Gradeup is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Thane, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gradeup!
